name: S9: Metformin — Multi-Outcome Repurposing Signal Profile
description: Random effects meta-analysis combining metformin effect estimates across colorectal neoplasm, Alzheimer's disease, composite MACE, and all-cause mortality. Generates a unified repurposing signal forest plot following the OHDSI LEGEND framework.

design_json.description: Multi-outcome evidence synthesis combining 4 CohortMethod results into a repurposing signal profile
